transcript.text:
(Tzuyang is going on a new challenge today...) Let's go take the challenge
(The New Menu Item of Young Dabang Spicy Challenge Tteokbokki!!!)
(But where is Tzuyang... Who are you guys...?)
(Since Tzuyang has zero spice tolerance...)
(Hello, we're Team Young Dabang) (Spice Rescue Squad!)
(With the Spice Rescue Squad, let's begin the friendship test!)
(As Korea's best mukbanger, I, Tzuyang...)
(shall protect my team...)
(But we aren't actually friends haha)
(Everybody's giving up...)
(Huh...? What...?)
(Did I... get scammed...?)
(Turns out... They're the Spice Rescue Scam?!)
- Challenge! - Challenge!
(Can Tzuyang and the Rescue Team... become friends...?)
Hey, guys

Today! I'm here
(Young Dabang, the rest area with luxury tteokbokki!) to have some Young Dabang tteokbokki
(Young Dabang's Signature 40cm tteok!) This place is famous for their long tteok,
so I often ate their tteokbokki
(New menu item at Young Dabang?) And they released a new menu item
It's a very spicy tteokbokki,
(Tzuyang is fully prepared...) so I got all prepared, I even tied my hair,
and I'm here to take the challenge
(Yangjae Citizens' Forest Branch Young Dabang)
(Is this the one?)
(Even its name is intimidating...) It's called the Spicy Challenge Tteokbokki,
and they say it's very spicy
(Grrrrrr) They put a lot of effort into making it
(You... You're quite scary...!) It just looks so scary
(Here's the menu!) Hello
Spice Level 1 is the basic flavor, and it's as spicy as Shin Ramyun

It's for people with low spice tolerance
Spice Level 2 gets a bit hotter, so it's like Cheongyang chili peppers
Spice Level 3 is like regular Buldak Noodles
And Level 4 is like
Nuclear Buldak Noodles
(Nuclear Buldak Noodles...?)
(Spice Level 1 is already too hard) Level 1 is like Shin Ramyun, how spicy is that?
Then!
I want each and every Spice Level...!!
Okay...
(I also want toppings!) Doesn't this place offer a lot of toppings?
Make Level 4 a basic tteokbokki
Add beef brisket to Level 3!
Boneless fried chicken in Level 2!
And Ojjang (fried squid) in Level 1!
- And... - (And...?)

The fried chicken looks so delicious!!
(Plump Chicking, Honey Soy Chicking) We have two boneless fried chicken items here
(Butter Chicking & Spicy Chicking) We also have two new items
(Butter Chicking & Spicy Chicking) These are also new?
(Can't resist new menu items!) Then I want these two fried chicken dishes!
(Okay for now...) We got it
Thank you
("Young Dabang," the titan of instant tteokbokki)
(They're back with a spicy new menu item...!)
(Level 1)
(Level 2)
(Level 3)
(Level 4)
(Guys, beware...)
(It's really spicy) (Level 1 / Level 2 / Level 3 / Level 4)
(If you can't stand spicy food, don't even dare trying)

(the Spicy Challenge Tteokbokki)
(The Famous Young Dabang Side Dish, "Ojjang')
(Level 1 + Ojjang)
(Level 2 + Boneless Fried Chicken)
(Level 3 + Beef Brisket)
(And "Level 4" on a whole different color and class)
(And with the tteokbokki, there's more new items!)
(Butter Chicking)
(Spicy Chicking)
(Level 1 comes first-!) Here's the Level 1 tteokbokki
(And we also got Levels 2 / 3 / 4) Is this Level 3?
Wow, look at its color
(And now, the long-awaited final boss...)
I'm scared by its color...
(Intense)
(And the Butter Chicking and Spicy Chicking are here!)

Would you also like to have some delicious fruit ade?
We have hallabong, grape, and tropical ades
Which one would you like?
(Just give me everything...!) I'd like them all...
Thank you!!
(They might have intense colors,) Wow, look at that
(but they also look so delicious...!) The color... It's so scary
The Level 1 tteokbokki is already very red
The cheese... Wow, the cheese!
And the toppings!
It's fried squid,
(The Ojjang topping!) and they fried a whole squid
(Let's try eating Level 1!) How spicy will it be?
(The long tteok just keeps coming up!)
(Chewy wheat tteok is what Tzuyang likes) I love wheat tteok
It's very nice and chewy

It's so delicious...!
It's as spicy as Shin Ramyun
I can feel a slight heat and spiciness
(Usually, you cut that tteok before eating)
This is so good!
The sauce is so good, and it's been so long since I had it, so it's even tastier!
The cheese...!
Let's cut the cheese a bit
(Also with the Ojjang!) I'll also slice the fried squid
(Indeed... That's the Ojjang I know...) You get a whole squid like this
Cut it
I'll place some squid on top of the cheese!
(Savoring)
Wow, the tteok is so long
Young Dabang sells some amazing tteok
It's so delicious

(Gochugaru* sprinkled over the cheese!) The gochugaru is a bit spicy, *Korean Chili Powder
so it gives some some sudden bursts of heat
Even Level 1 is a bit spicy
(Next, we have the new Spicy Chicking) This is spicy fried chicken
Young Dabang is also famous for their boneless fried chicken
And the sauce makes it tastier...
(+ A piece of tteok)
It is a bit spicy,
(Zero spice tolerance's cute bluff) It isn't that spicy
Ramyeon!
(Immediately activating coward mode...) The ramyeon noodles look a bit spicy
Wait
Why is Level 1 this spicy...????
Is that the fruit ade?!
(1L fruit ades to soothe her irritated mouth!) Wow... Thank you
It's so delicious!

Does this use the same sauce as the basic Young Dabang tteokbokki?
(They used a different spicy sauce!) No, we reduced the sweetness in this one
to differentiate the dish
Really? They use different sauces?
(I'm really serious..!) It's so delicious
I think it's even tastier
(Blood, sweat, and tears were put to create it!) We had a hard time making it
We also can't eat spicy food,
so we had a hard time developing the recipe
(Thanks to you, I'll have a good meal!) Thank you
(The long 40cm tteok she ate without cutting!) When I ate that long Young Dabang tteok,
I was amazed at how tasty the wheat tteok was
They actually get fresh tteok every morning
The sausage is also mine!
(Nobody's taking your food) It's all mine
(Heh)

(Ha)
Is this actually Spice Level 1? Maybe they switched them?
It seems like it's very spicy...
Doesn't it taste spicier than Shin Ramyun?
We actually measured the Scoville units,
and it's way lower than you think!
It has a low Scoville unit... But can it feel spicier...?
Level 4...
is as spicy as "Singil-dong Jjamppong"
"Singil-dong Jjamppong"...???
(You said Nuclear Buldak Noodles earlier...)
You can have a helper
Oh really?
(Since Tzuyang can't handle the heat) We'll prepare one food taster!
Get one who loves spicy food
This person really loves eating spicy food!

(The Spicy Food Savior... Coming Soon...!) The best in our staff!
Level 1, clear!
What about Levels 2 and 3?
I... gotta eat them!
I never ate them...Haha
(What? I feel so betrayed)
I can't eat spicy food, but I love eating it
So I love taking these spicy food challenges
Now that I think about it, I ate TeumSae Ramen, Buldak Noodles,
(All the spicy food she ate so far...) Singil-dong Jjamppong,
(All the spicy food she ate so far...) Dijinda Pork Cutlet, all kinds of spicy food
(Self-proclaimed) I'm a spicy food fanatic
The fried chicken is so good here
Not what you'd expect at a tteokbokki place!
It's like what you get at a fried chicken place
The sprinkled garlic flakes go so well with it

The sauce is a bit spicy,
(Creating the Perfect Sweet and Spicy Harmony!) and it's also very sweet, so...
The sauce is so tasty
Let's try the grape ade!!
At the bottom,
you can see some grape chunks
I like the consistency Sweet and yummy!
The chunks easily pass through the straw
(NEXT LEVEL Time to challenge Level 2)
(The tteokbokki... It's making me afraid...)
The tteokbokki they sell
(The two basic toppings!) usually include cheese and ramyeon noodles
But I thought the noodles would get too spicy,
(Only eating the ramyeon with Level 1...) so I asked them to only add it in Level 1
Wow, wait, don't soak the fried chicken!!
(I want to save... the fried chicken...) No! It's already soaked!

This time, I'll cut the tteok
Let's cut them nicely
(Level 2 Challenge!) I'll give it a taste
Wait, I should eat it quickly before it gets spicier
(Fish them out)
But the sauce is really tasty though
Wow!
(Impressed a lot... at how spicy it is...)
(Isn't it spicy...?)
(Help me...)
The staff are like devils
(Lucifers appeared at Young Dabang)
You said it's like Buldak Noodles!!!
(It's like... [The Truman Show]...) Did you all fool me?
(Can i get... a substitute...?) Is these anybody who can eat this if I can't?
(You eat it / No, you / Over there) (Wow, so many volunteers)

(I, Lucifer... have a gift)
Thank you! Hahaha
Wow! the Cooldabang drink!!
(I, Tzuyang, cannot let those Lucifers triumph...)
(Madness)
(Special delivery)
(The Developer Lucifer gets it) I can't eat it, I really can't eat it
(Just excitedhahahaha)
Can I get a Cooldabang...?
(How will the Developer Lucifer react...?)
I think I built up my spice tolerance a bit as we developed the recipe for Level 2
(No... This can't be true...)
(The Developer was bluffing LOL) It's spicy, I think I'm gonna cry!
(But she still finished her dish!)
Wait a sec
(I, Tzuyang, never goes down alone) I don't know who's the real devil!

(Fallen) It's like [I Saw The Devil]
(The next target is the owner and her husband...)
Spicy food lovers can enjoy it up to Level 2
(Terrified)
(The Developer Lucifer is crying hahaha)
(The owner loves it...!) It's delicious to me
It's delicious!
(Her husband is about to cry... hahaha) How can you eat this?
Level 1 is perfect if you think you can take
some spicy food now and then
And Level 2 is for people who can easily eat
Buldak Noodles
(These two are the real problem...) But starting with Level 3...
I'll have to eat it to know, but I'm scared to eat it
The sauce is so delicious!
(With the help from Lucifers, Level 2 CLEAR!)

HAA!
AHHH!
(Are you two making peace signs right now...?)
Right now..! I'm dying from how spicy it is...!!
(The Lucifers are just happy... LOL) Success!
To soothe my mouth,
(Time for the Butter Chicking!) I'll eat this
It's their new item called the Butter Chicking
(Its appearance gets a pass...) Did they add butter and cheese to it?
This is so good!
If you eat this with the spicy tteokbokki, it'll be amazing!
It'll be perfect with some beer
The fried chicken is so good,
it's like I'm at a chicken place
Level 3...
(I'm Tzuyang... Let's do this!!) Here I go!

I'll only fish out a tteok
(How can I eat this?????) Just the color is already different!
I'm scared!
(Now the Lucifers feel sorry and can't look...) Is the tteok actually red?
I'll give it a taste
I'll only eat one piece!
But it really smells tasty
(That's why you can't stop eating tteokbokki...) It smells spicy but also tasty
(The smell made her have a bold bite...!)
(Picking another tteok without saying anything...?)
WOOOOWWW!!!
I need a helper...!!!
(Now... It's my turn...!) He's here
(Young Dabang Spicy Food Lover) Wow, what is this!?
Hello hahaha
(+ The helper entered) Can you actually eat it?

(This guy... He feels a bit trustworthy...) After all, it's just a bit spicy
(Immediate challenge) I'll start eating it
(Can the helper accomplish his mission...?)
(Eye contact)
(Why are you both not talking...?)
(Super interested)
Huh? It's okay
He actually can't eat spicy food
You said he loves spicy food...!!!!!
(Huh...? What is the truth...??)
(Truth : He has the lowest spice tolerance)
(Then how is this happening...???)
(He's just that dedicated and determined...!) You see... the staff were just joking around
- I actually can't eat spicy food - Really?
Are you okay?!
(How is he eating it so well lol) It's really spicy!

But when I actually ate it,
it was actually quite tolerable
It's really spicy
(It feels so unfair...) Is the whole world trying to trick me?
Pass me Level 4
Really???!!!!!!
What's going on with him?
(You take the wheels for the mukbang..) Please tell everyone how it tastes for me
I thought Level 3 was very spicy...
But even normal people can eat it!
(Excuse me...?) It's spicy in a delicious way
(Huh...?)
This one... The damage builds up
Your philtrum is shining!
(Only now she's curious who he is) Do you work here?
I am manager Jo Seong-ju in the logistics team

It seems like you love spicy food
Maybe I should also give it a taste...?
(Try this instead, Tzuyang...) Try that?!
(Humans are never satisfied with their greed)
(and repeat the same mistakes...)
(Stupid Tzuyang) Wow...! What is this?!
(Meanwhile, he just kept eating the beef brisket...) How can he eat this?
It's so spicy!
AHH! AHH!
The beef brisket is tastier than the tteok
The beef brisket is really good
The beef brisket is delicious
(Thanks to the spice-intolerant (?) helper...)
(LEVEL 3 CLEAR!)
(Thank you so much...) We cleared Level 3 thanks to you
(Tell me... You have to love spicy food...!) You ate it so well

Anybody can visit and eat it
What?!!
(Call 911, it's a fraud scheme...!) That's not true! Don't trust him!
It looks like I suck at eating spicy food!!
Since you're having such a hard time...
(Challenging Level 4 with the Lucifers-!!) we can eat it with you
Yes, I'd love to!
With our powers combined, let's eat Level 4!
- Let's eat! - Let's eat!
But before that, can I some more watermelon?
(Ready for the relay mukbang...!)
(Tzuyang's bold (?) attempt!) Let's eat two tteok slices
One more tteok! One more tteok!
(Excuse me...?) One more tteok! One more tteok!
(+ One more tteok) Two...
(Runner 1, Tzuyang begins the challenge!)

(Trying to beat the heat with her speed...) Is that it?
(Oh, you're going for more...?!)
(Her dedication... Impressed the Lucifers...!)
Wait, wait!
(Are you... are you actually okay...?)
(How touching...)
AHHHH!!!!
(She ate a lot, and she stops here!!!) I can't eat anymore!
(We're proud of you, Tzuyang...)
(HELP ME)
(We're screwed...)
(- Tzuyang logged out)
(+ Developer logged in)
I am manager Kim Hae-mi in the development team
(Don't force yourself!) Smell it, and if you don't think you can handle it, just come out
(This is a game of friendship...) The next runners can eat it for you

(Sound of Tzuyang in pain)
(By the way, this manager...)
(She's hoarding the sausages...!)
(Runner 2, Manager Kim H. begins!)
(As a member of the development team, she's doing well so far...)
(Oh, she's eating it well...!)
(Quick GG)
(With that, Runner 2 is OUT...)
(Huh...? / Huh...? / Huh...?)
(But she ate a lot...!) She did her worth
(That's all for me...)
(Tzuyang, I'll borrow your green plum juice)
(HAHAHAHAHA) She stole Tzuyang's green plum juice!
(Next Runner) I'm manager Kim Yeo-jin in Management
(Hi)
(Runner 3, Manager Kim Y. begins!)

It isn't that spicy
It's delicious!
No way...
There are no more sausages left
(S-sorry...)
(Is she the true hero?!) It isn't really that spicy
(Now it's here)
(Quickly lost her motivation...)
(Farewell everyone...!) That's it for me
(HELP)
My throat hurts
(+ The next runner logged in)
Hello, I'm manager Lee Ha-yeong in the development team
(The channel owner is quietly doing a watermelon mukbang)
There's so much cheese left, so I'll eat it first
(Runner 4, Manager Lee begins!) There's the recipe developer

Tsurely (?), it's nothing like Level 2!
"Tsurely?"
(Everybody... Can't speak...)
Isn't it spicy?
It is spicy, but...
Yes, it's spicy
(But you're eating it so well) Are you really okay? Am I the only one?
You also ate a lot of it!
(She ended her portion so nicely-!) I will stop eating here
It's spicy
It's spicy, but it's okay...
But it's also spicy
But in a spicy way...!
(Farewell now...) I'll get going now
(+ Self-proclaimed standard logged in) I was the standard
Hello, I'm manager Park So-jeong in the strategy team

You're getting way more food than I thought!
(She got a big heart) That's so much food
(Runner 5, Manager Park begins!) You all didn't eat that much food
(Why is she the "standard" of this tteokbokki...?)
Isn't it spicy?
(It's her... She's The One...) It isn't that spicy
(Her expressions aren't changing at all...)
I love eating, and I love spicy food
And I had the happiest times as we developed this menu item
(But everybody else is suffering...)
(The only one okay) She tested the recipe
Her expressions aren't changing
That's why Level 1 was also spicy!
I apologize
(Everyone is staring at awe...)
(Saving some for the next runner, END!!) I'll leave two pieces

(Ms. Standard... You're so amazing...)
(And lastly, the helper is here...) There's really not much left
You also gotta taste the sauce...
What is wrong with you?
Really?!
(This helper... He's digging his own grave...) And he'd be like, "Weren't I cool?"
(Applause to your passion...)
(Last runner, the helper begins!)
(Once you start eating, you're never speaking)
(Like that, he lost his ability to speech...)
(Here's a crisis)
(Second crisis) Finally!
(Why did I say I'll eat this...?)
You already committed to it!
You're working so hard...
(Passionately finished the broth...!) You're really working so hard

(YOUNG DABANG NEW MENU ITEM ALL CLEAR!) Good job!
(I love... watermelons...)
From Level 1 to Level 4!
Though I didn't do it alone!
(With everybody's powers united, we even finished Level 4...!) But we managed to finish everything
I can tell you that the sauce is very tasty
It's less sweet, and it has a very nice savory flavor
It's very spicy, but it's also very delicious!
And they also sell regular tteokbokki dishes
for people who can't eat spicy food
(The Potato Tteokbokki is also amazing!) I heard the potato rosé tteokbokki is tasty
(All bunsik lovers, gather up at Young Dabang...!) If you love tteokbokki,
I'd say you give it a try
We had a great meal today!
